title: INF-2 KV cache UI knob (quant + prefix TTL + occupancy display)
goal: KV cache UI in Inference Lab per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES: quant-level picker (none/q4/q8/q4_q8_mix), prefix-cache TTL slider, live occupancy bar (bytes used / capacity + hit rate), evict-all button. Hidden when capabilities.supportsKvQuantization == None.
expected_diff_shape: New Svelte component app/src/components/inference_lab/KvCachePanel.svelte + store; integration into InferenceLab parent view.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES + AC-MODEL-RUNTIME-CONTROL-PANEL field set: KV occupancy displayed live in panel; quant picker writes through to settings.exec_policy.kv_cache.quantization. KvCachePanel.svelte: select dropdown for KvQuantSupport (None|Q4|Q8|Q4Q8Mix; mapped from capability set); slider for prefix_cache_ttl_seconds (30..3600); live occupancy bar (polls kernel_model_runtime_kv_occupancy every 2s); hit-rate badge; [Evict all] button calls kernel_model_runtime_kv_evict_all. Per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-TOGGLES "hidden, not greyed": when supportsKvQuantization == None, hide the quant picker (kept prefix TTL slider as long as supportsKvPrefixCache == true). A/B compare per AC-INFER-LAB-UI-AB-COMPARE: pick a generation prompt, render side-by-side gen output at current quant vs proposed quant.
proof_commands: cd app && pnpm exec playwright test --grep kv_cache_panel
risk_if_missed: INF-2 UI knob missing; operator cannot tune KV cache through Inference Lab.
validator_focus: Hidden-not-greyed when unsupported; live occupancy actually updates; A/B compare flow present.

minimum_controls: Live occupancy polling does not flood IPC (every 2s cap).
Evict-all button confirmation dialog (prevent accidental cache wipe under load).
